title: Airtel Africa’s Half-Year Results Show Resilient Growth Amidst Challenging Macro Environment - FinancialEDGE
description: Airtel Africa Plc, released it half year financial showing strong fundamentals as focussed execution continue to support operating performance despite challenging macro economic environment. According to the result that was released to Nigeria Exchange Limited (NGX), the operating highlights shows that Total customer base grew by 8.6% to 155.4 million.
